title: [Bug]: The comparison result between a zero DATETIME value and NULL does not match the expectation.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, c2 INT);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c1 IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c1 = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' AND c2 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Comparison of zero DATETIME value with NULL
